name: Premier Investments Limited
analysis: PMV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$14.1700. Trade idea: entry A$14.1700, stop A$12.1770, target A$20.1490 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
